content.Text:
[Tue 2026-04-21 15:08 CDT] Build the BHBMW PMA Competitor Dashboard — a static HTML page showing Brian Harris BMW's competitive landscape in Baton Rouge vs. Price LeBlanc Lexus and Mercedes-Benz of Baton Rouge.

## Location
Create: `~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/dashboard/bhbmw-pma.html`

## Data to use (hardcoded from today's recon — April 21, 2026)

### Brian Harris BMW
- Google Ads: ~200 active | Agency: J&L Marketing | Top models: Used X7, X5, Pre-Owned
- Meta Ads: 0 currently active
- Rating: 4.7★ (2,161 reviews)

### Price LeBlanc Lexus (Competitor)
- Google Ads: ~200 active | Agency: Toyota Motor Sales USA (OEM/national) | Top models: 2025 TX, Luxury SUVs, L/Certified
- Meta Ads: ~4 active | Started: April 1, 2026 | Theme: Generic branding + pre-owned
- Messaging: "Turn every drive into a statement" — generic OEM copy
- Rating: 4.7★ (14 reviews — very low)
- Weakness: OEM-controlled ads = no local flexibility, minimal social presence

### Mercedes-Benz of Baton Rouge (Competitor)
- Google Ads: 52 active | Agency: BIJ LA LLC (local) | Top models: 2026 S-Class, CPO program
- Meta Ads: ~250 active | Running since April 2025 | Theme: CPO "3/30 Guarantee", CLE 300, 164-point inspection
- Messaging: "Only the best for you" — strong CPO narrative
- Rating: 4.7★ (282 Carfax, 788 DealerRater)
- Strength: Aggressive Meta presence, strong CPO story
- Weakness: Only 52 Google ads vs BHBMW's 200

## Design Requirements
- Dark theme matching BHBMW BMW blue (#1C69D4) accent
- Header: "Brian Harris BMW — PMA Intelligence" with today's date
- Three competitor cards side by side (BHBMW | Lexus BR | Mercedes BR)
- Each card shows:
  - Store name + logo placeholder
  - Google Ads count + agency name + top model push
  - Meta Ads count + top creative theme
  - Star rating
  - "Opportunities" section (weaknesses to exploit)
- Bottom section: "Strategic Recommendations for BHBMW" with 3 bullet points:
  1. Out-local Lexus — they're on OEM autopilot, BHBMW can win with specific BR messaging
  2. Counter Mercedes CPO — BMW CPO program is stronger, say it louder
  3. Activate Meta — 0 vs 250 is a gap, push new model content + CPO on social
- Footer: "Last updated: April 21, 2026 | TAS — Tactical Awareness Suite | The Cooperative Agency"
- Responsive, clean, professional — this is a client deliverable

## After building
Confirm file exists and report the path. No need to push to GitHub yet.

Thinking.text: The user wants me to build a static HTML dashboard. Let me create it directly.

ToolUse.name: ls ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/dashboard/ 2>/dev/null || echo "directory does not exist"
ToolUse.raw_input: {"command":"ls ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/dashboard/ 2>/dev/null || echo \"directory does not exist\"","description":"Check if target directory exists"}

ToolUse.name: Write /Users/lucfaucheux/.openclaw/workspace/tas/dashboard/bhbmw-pma.html

input.content:
Brian Harris BMW — PMA Intelligence

Primary Market Area · Baton Rouge, LA · April 21, 2026

Live Recon

Competitive Landscape

BMW

Brian Harris BMW

Your Dealership
Google Ads ~200 active
Agency J&L Marketing
Used X7 X5 Pre-Owned
Meta Ads 0 active
★★★★☆ 4.7 (2,161 reviews)

Key Gap

Zero Meta/social ad presence while competitors run up to 250 creatives. Massive untapped channel.

LEX

Price LeBlanc Lexus

Competitor
Google Ads ~200 active
Agency Toyota Motor Sales USA (OEM)
2025 TX Luxury SUVs L/Certified
Meta Ads ~4 active
Since April 1, 2026
Generic branding Pre-owned
★★★★☆ 4.7 (14 reviews — very low)

Opportunities to Exploit

OEM-controlled ads with no local flexibility. Generic messaging ("Turn every drive into a statement"). Minimal social presence. Tiny review footprint — easy to out-trust.

No local control Low reviews Generic copy
MB

Mercedes-Benz of Baton Rouge

Competitor
Google Ads 52 active
Agency BIJ LA LLC (local)
2026 S-Class CPO Program
Meta Ads ~250 active
Since April 2025 (12+ months)
CPO "3/30 Guarantee" CLE 300 164-pt inspection
★★★★☆ 4.7 (282 Carfax / 788 DealerRater)

Opportunities to Exploit

Only 52 Google Ads vs BHBMW's 200 — you dominate search. Strong CPO narrative on social but BMW CPO can match it. Messaging is polished but beatable with local authenticity.

Low Google volume CPO-dependent

Action Items

▶ Strategic Recommendations for BHBMW

  • 1

    Out-Local Lexus

    Price LeBlanc is running on OEM autopilot — generic national copy, no local voice. BHBMW can win by leaning into Baton Rouge-specific messaging, community ties, and hyper-local offers that a Toyota corporate desk in Plano can't touch.

  • 2

    Counter the Mercedes CPO Narrative

    Mercedes-Benz of BR has built a strong CPO story on Meta (3/30 Guarantee, 164-point inspection). BMW's CPO program is equally strong — unlimited mileage warranty, roadside assistance, loaner vehicles. Say it louder. Directly counter their messaging with BMW CPO creative on the same platforms.

  • 3

    Activate Meta — Close the 0 vs. 250 Gap

    BHBMW has zero Meta ads running while Mercedes is at ~250 creatives with 12+ months of momentum. Launch a Meta campaign immediately: new model showcases, CPO inventory, and community content. Even a modest 20-30 active ads closes the visibility gap in the feed.

Last updated: April 21, 2026  ·  TAS — Tactical Awareness Suite  ·  The Cooperative Agency

content.Text:
File created at:

```
~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/dashboard/bhbmw-pma.html
```

Dark theme, BMW blue accents, three competitor cards side-by-side with all the data points (Google/Meta ad counts, agencies, top models, creative themes, ratings, and exploitable weaknesses), strategic recommendations section, and the TAS footer. Responsive down to mobile. Ready for client review — open it in a browser to preview.
